notes: Lesson 24 Part 2 (act 142) 'Union Find — Number of Provinces', 73.3s, 6 cues. Nodes 0..4; edges build groups {0,1,2}(root 0) and {3,4}(root 3) -> 2 provinces; redundant cycle edge (1,2) changes nothing. Uses graph.py forest_nodes/parent_arrow/root_ring/node_circle. Single -ql pass clean; READ start/mid/end each cue.

frames.notes: [start] two trees 1,2->0 (blue root ring) and 4->3 (green root ring), 'root' labels; note 'find(1)=find(2)=0 -> same root -> same group'
[mid] two trees 1,2->0 (blue root ring) and 4->3 (green root ring), 'root' labels; note 'find(1)=find(2)=0 -> same root -> same group'
[end] two trees 1,2->0 (blue root ring) and 4->3 (green root ring), 'root' labels; note 'find(1)=find(2)=0 -> same root -> same group'

[start] singletons 0,1,2; edge (0,1) roots differ -> 1 attaches under 0 count 3->2; edge (1,2) find(1)=0,find(2)=2 differ -> 2 attaches under 0 count 2->1; 'each union merges two trees -> one fewer group'

[mid] singletons 0,1,2; edge (0,1) roots differ -> 1 attaches under 0 count 3->2; edge (1,2) find(1)=0,find(2)=2 differ -> 2 attaches under 0 count 2->1; 'each union merges two trees -> one fewer group'

[end] singletons 0,1,2; edge (0,1) roots differ -> 1 attaches under 0 count 3->2; edge (1,2) find(1)=0,find(2)=2 differ -> 2 attaches under 0 count 2->1; 'each union merges two trees -> one fewer group'
[start] group {0,1,2} formed (1->0,2->0, root ring 0); redundant edge (1,2) both root at 0 -> rose, 'find(1)=find(2)=0 -> a cycle, skip', count unchanged (1)
[mid] group {0,1,2} formed (1->0,2->0, root ring 0); redundant edge (1,2) both root at 0 -> rose, 'find(1)=find(2)=0 -> a cycle, skip', count unchanged (1)
[end] group {0,1,2} formed (1->0,2->0, root ring 0); redundant edge (1,2) both root at 0 -> rose, 'find(1)=find(2)=0 -> a cycle, skip', count unchanged (1)
[start] path compression: chain 2->1->0 flattens so 2 and 1 point straight at root 0; union by rank: shorter tree B hangs under taller A; bound O(alpha(V)) ~ O(1)
[mid] path compression: chain 2->1->0 flattens so 2 and 1 point straight at root 0; union by rank: shorter tree B hangs under taller A; bound O(alpha(V)) ~ O(1)
[end] path compression: chain 2->1->0 flattens so 2 and 1 point straight at root 0; union by rank: shorter tree B hangs under taller A; bound O(alpha(V)) ~ O(1)
[start] final forest, root rings on 0 and 3, group chips {0,1,2} and {3,4}, 'provinces 2' badge
[mid] final forest, root rings on 0 and 3, group chips {0,1,2} and {3,4}, 'provinces 2' badge
[end] final forest, root rings on 0 and 3, group chips {0,1,2} and {3,4}, 'provinces 2' badge
[start] connectivity vs path: 'connected(0,2)? YES' but 'the actual path 0->2?' -> 'use BFS/DFS for that'
[mid] connectivity vs path: 'connected(0,2)? YES' but 'the actual path 0->2?' -> 'use BFS/DFS for that'
